recommendations.title: Solitary Man
recommendations.overview: A car magnate watches his personal and professional life hit the skids because of his business and romantic indiscretions.

recommendations.title: Satan's Little Helper
recommendations.overview: A naïve young boy unknowingly becomes the pawn of a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Feyzo, The Polite One
recommendations.overview: To bid for his beloved's hand in marriage, poor villager Feyzo must come up with an enormous dowry to appease her father.

recommendations.title: Ready to Mingle
recommendations.overview: A wannabe bride seeks professional help to find a husband and in the process finds herself.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young aspiring violinist unwittingly becomes involved with a criminal gang.

recommendations.title: Prime
recommendations.overview: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: Welcome to Me
recommendations.overview: A year in the life of Alice Klieg, a woman with Borderline personality disorder who wins the Mega Millions lottery, quits her meds and buys her own talk show.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.
